```json
    }
  ],
```

```json
{

    "behavior_signals_90d: message_to_ca - 主动问CA新一季运动鞋什么时候到",
    "behavior_signals_90d: wishlist_add - 收藏了kelly green配色的同款迷你包",
    "behavior_signals_90d: content_click - 小红书博主穿搭：tenniscore度假风",
    "style_profile: tenniscore, retro_sport, playful",
    "product_affinity_notes: 收藏型买家，对首发/限量/联名非常敏感",
    "trend T03: 迷你包 × 声量配饰, peak阶段, 社交媒体活跃用户"
  ],
  "recommended_products": [
    {"item": "Kelly green配色迷你链条包", "reason": "直接对应wishlist需求 + 收藏型购买习惯 + T03迷你包趋势peak"},
    {"item": "新季tenniscore运动鞋", "reason": "客户主动询问 + tenniscore风格匹配 + 运动鞋类别偏好"}
  ],
  "wechat_drafts": [
    {
      "tone": "excited_insider",
      "message": "晓彤！你要的那双新季运动鞋刚到，还有你收藏的kelly green小包也有现货了🎾 要不要我先给你留着？这个绿色真的太适合春天出片了"
    },
    {
      "tone": "exclusive_preview",
      "message": "晓彤，记得你问的新季运动鞋吗？今天刚到店，还有你wishlist里那个kelly green迷你包现在有货。我觉得这套配起来特别适合你最近关注的那种tennis风～"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "risk_flags": [],
  "do_not_say": [
    "避免提及消费能力或价格",
    "避免与其他客户对比",
    "避免过于正式的语气"
  ],
  "next_step": "在她偏好的时间段(12:00-14:00)发送消息。如果她感兴趣，立即发送实物图片并提供到店试用或直接预订服务。考虑到她对'首发/限量'的敏感度，可以适当强调新品刚到的时效性。"
}
```

```json
{
  "best_angle": "慢美学工艺叙事 + 春季皮具预览",
  "outreach_type": "curated_preview",
  "angle_summary": "客户最近到店关注植鞣牛皮旅行袋但未购买，点击了制革工坊内容，正值'慢美学/匠心底蕴'趋势与其heritage收藏家身份完美契合。以工艺故事为切入点，自然引入春季皮具。",
  "evidence_used": [
    "behavior_signals_90d: 到店浏览春季皮具系列，对植鞣牛皮旅行袋反复触摸但未购买",
    "behavior_signals_90d: 点击品牌公众号推文：百年制革工坊纪实",
    "style_profile: heritage_chic, classic",
    "persona_tag: 传统品味收藏家",
    "product_affinity_notes: 极其看重产品背后的故事——皮革产地、百年工坊历史",
    "trend T05: 慢美学/匠心底蕴，rising，leather_goods相关，驼色/酒红/森林绿"
  ],
  "recommended_products": [
    {"item": "植鞣牛皮旅行袋（驼色或酒红）", "reason": "客户到店已关注此款，符合其heritage偏好和色彩喜好"},
    {"item": "编织皮革公文包（森林绿）", "reason": "匹配商务场景需求，无logo设计符合慢美学趋势和客户品味"}
  ],
  "wechat_drafts": [
    {
      "tone": "工艺叙事",
      "message": "林先生，上次您看的那款植鞣皮旅行袋，刚了解到更多制作细节——用的是托斯卡纳地区180年老厂的皮料，每张皮都要自然风干8个月。实物质感确实值得细品，您方便的话我可以为您单独预约时间。"
    },
    {
      "tone": "品质导向",
      "message": "林先生好，想到您对制革工艺的兴趣，本季几款无logo设计的皮具刚到店，工艺和用料都很有故事。包括您上次关注的那款，我先帮您留着，您看什么时候过来感受一下实物。"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "risk_flags": [],
  "do_not_say": [
    "避免提及潮流或社交媒体趋势",
    "避免催促或紧迫感用词",
    "避免过度热情的表达"
  ],
  "next_step": "客户回复后安排专属预约时间，准备相关工艺资料和产品故事，重点介绍制作工艺细节和皮革来源。如无回复，可在一周后以电话方式跟进（符合其偏好）。"
}
```

trend T05: 慢美学/匠心底蕴，rising，leather_goods相关，驼色/酒红/森林绿

recommended_products.item: 植鞣牛皮旅行袋（驼色或酒红）
recommended_products.reason: 客户到店已关注此款，符合其heritage偏好和色彩喜好

recommended_products.item: 编织皮革公文包（森林绿）
recommended_products.reason: 匹配商务场景需求，无logo设计符合慢美学趋势和客户品味

wechat_drafts.message: 林先生，上次您看的那款植鞣皮旅行袋，刚了解到更多制作细节——用的是托斯卡纳地区180年老厂的皮料，每张皮都要自然风干8个月。实物质感确实值得细品，您方便的话我可以为您单独预约时间。
林先生好，想到您对制革工艺的兴趣，本季几款无logo设计的皮具刚到店，工艺和用料都很有故事。包括您上次关注的那款，我先帮您留着，您看什么时候过来感受一下实物。

do_not_say: 避免提及潮流或社交媒体趋势
避免催促或紧迫感用词
避免过度热情的表达
parsed.next_step: 客户回复后安排专属预约时间，准备相关工艺资料和产品故事，重点介绍制作工艺细节和皮革来源。如无回复，可在一周后以电话方式跟进（符合其偏好）。

parsed_en.best_angle: Slow aesthetics craftsmanship narrative + Spring leather goods preview
parsed_en.angle_summary: Customer recently visited store showing interest in vegetable-tanned leather travel bag but did not purchase, clicked on tannery workshop content. The 'slow aesthetics/artisanal heritage' trend perfectly aligns with their heritage collector identity. Using craftsmanship story as entry point to naturally introduce spring leather goods.
evidence_used: behavior_signals_90d: Visited store to browse spring leather collection, repeatedly touched vegetable-tanned leather travel bag but did not purchase
behavior_signals_90d: Clicked brand WeChat article: Century-old Tannery Workshop Documentary
style_profile: heritage_chic, classic
persona_tag: Traditional taste collector
product_affinity_notes: Extremely values stories behind products—leather origins, century-old workshop history
trend T05: Slow aesthetics/artisanal heritage, rising, leather_goods related, camel/burgundy/forest green

recommended_products.item: Vegetable-tanned leather travel bag (camel or burgundy)
recommended_products.reason: Customer already showed interest in this piece in store, matches heritage preference and color preferences
Matches business scenario needs, logo-free design aligns with slow aesthetics trend and customer taste

wechat_drafts.message: Mr. Lin, regarding the vegetable-tanned leather travel bag you viewed last time, I've learned more details about its creation—it uses leather from a 180-year-old Tuscan tannery, with each hide naturally air-dried for 8 months. The texture truly deserves close appreciation. If convenient for you, I can arrange a private appointment.

Hello Mr. Lin, knowing your interest in tanning craftsmanship, several logo-free leather pieces have just arrived in store this season, each with remarkable craftsmanship and materials with stories to tell. Including the piece you were interested in last time, I've set it aside for you. When would be convenient for you to experience them in person?

do_not_say: Avoid mentioning trends or social media trends
Avoid urgent or pressuring language
Avoid overly enthusiastic expressions
parsed_en.next_step: After customer responds, arrange exclusive appointment time, prepare relevant craftsmanship materials and product stories, focus on introducing manufacturing process details and leather origins. If no response, follow up by phone after one week (aligns with their preference).

parsed.best_angle: 慈善晚宴礼服预览 + 新大佬风趋势
parsed.angle_summary: 客户明确表达4月中旬慈善晚宴需求，结合其maximalist风格和'新大佬风'趋势的完美契合。利用具体场合需求+趋势洞察双重价值点进行outreach。

style_profile: maximalist, glamorous, dramatic
occasion_profile: 高端晚宴与慈善gala
trend T04: 新大佬风/皮草回潮, rising, evening_gowns相关

recommended_products.item: 戏剧性长礼服（香槟金或midnight black）
recommended_products.reason: 匹配晚宴场合需求+色彩偏好+maximalist风格
呼应新大佬风趋势+慈善晚宴的权威感需求

wechat_drafts.message: 赵女士下午好，关于您4月中旬的慈善晚宴，我们刚到了几件很有戏剧张力的长礼服。今年'新大佬风'回潮，正好符合您在这类场合需要的存在感。我先选几件拍给您看看？
思琳姐，您上次提到的慈善晚宴，我留意到今年皮草和maximalist风格强势回归，很适合您的气场。新到了几件show-stopper级别的礼服，要不我按您尺码准备好，您方便时过来试试？

do_not_say: 避免提及价格或性价比
避免暗示与其他客户的比较
避免使用'大众款'等词汇
parsed.next_step: 在客户偏好时间段(14:00-17:00)发送消息。如有兴趣，立即安排VIP试衣间预约，确保有充足改衣时间（距离4月中旬约3周）。准备多个backup选项以防第一选择不合适。

parsed_en.best_angle: Charity gala gown preview + new power dressing trend
parsed_en.angle_summary: Client explicitly expressed need for charity gala in mid-April, perfectly aligning with her maximalist style and the 'new power dressing' trend. Leveraging dual value points of specific occasion need plus trend insights for outreach.
evidence_used: behavior_signals_90d: 2026-03-12 asked about long gowns needed for mid-April charity gala
style_profile: maximalist, glamorous, dramatic
occasion_profile: high-end dinners and charity galas
trend T04: new power dressing/fur revival, rising, evening_gowns related

recommended_products.item: Dramatic long gown (champagne gold or midnight black)
recommended_products.reason: Matches gala occasion needs + color preferences + maximalist style
Echoes new power dressing trend + authority presence needed for charity gala

wechat_drafts.message: Good afternoon Ms. Zhao, regarding your mid-April charity gala, we just received several long gowns with remarkable dramatic presence. This year's 'new power dressing' revival perfectly suits the commanding presence you need for such occasions. Shall I select a few pieces to show you first?

Dear Celine, about the charity gala you mentioned last time, I've noticed this year's strong return of fur and maximalist styles, which perfectly complement your presence. We have several show-stopper level gowns that just arrived. Would you like me to prepare them in your size for you to try when convenient?

do_not_say: Avoid mentioning price or value for money
Avoid implying comparisons with other clients
Avoid using terms like 'mass market styles'
parsed_en.next_step: Send message during client's preferred time window (14:00-17:00). If interested, immediately arrange VIP fitting room appointment, ensuring sufficient alteration time (approximately 3 weeks until mid-April). Prepare multiple backup options in case first choices don't suit.

wechat_drafts.message: Mr. Liu, the lightweight travel shoes you wanted - we have several new arrivals, all passed full-day comfort tests. I've selected two pairs in black and gray and took photos for you, size 43 in stock.
